# IzaXotic

> Your Vision, Engineered Into Reality

IzaXotic is a code-first digital studio that turns bold ideas into immersive web experiences from scratch. Every project is 100% custom-coded — no templates, no drag-and-drop builders, no shortcuts. Every pixel placed, every function written — by hand.

## About

Founded in 2022 by Prem IzaX, IzaXotic specialises in premium web development and UI/UX design. The studio delivers pixel-perfect, performance-optimised digital products using cutting-edge technologies including Next.js, React, Three.js, GSAP, and Framer Motion.

## Services

- **Custom Web Development**: Hand-coded websites and web applications built with Next.js, React, and TypeScript. Mobile-first, SEO-optimised, and blazing fast.
- **UI/UX Design**: Complete design systems crafted in Figma, translated into production-ready code. Research-driven, accessible, and visually stunning.
- **3D & Interactive Experiences**: Immersive Three.js scenes, advanced animations with GSAP and Framer Motion, and micro-interactions that delight users.

## Pricing

- **Essential** — Starting at ₹15,000 (~$180 USD). Custom-coded website with up to 5 pages, responsive design, contact form, and SEO setup. Delivery: 1-2 weeks.
- **Professional** — Starting at ₹45,000 (~$540 USD). Full-scale web application with up to 12 pages, advanced animations, CMS, and 3D elements. Delivery: 3-5 weeks.
- **Enterprise** — Starting at ₹1,00,000 (~$1,200 USD). Enterprise-grade digital products with unlimited pages, full backend integration, and dedicated project management. Delivery: 6-10 weeks.

## Contact

- Email: hello@izaxotic.com
- Website: https://izaxotic-prototype.netlify.app
- Response Time: Within 24 hours

## Technology Stack

Next.js, React, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, Three.js, GSAP, Framer Motion, Zustand, Zod, Node.js
